title: Where is Azrael?
description: Solo project featuring a custom dialog system, boss fight, and environment design in a medieval pixel-art world.
overview:
## Where is Azrael?

A personal project exploring deep narrative systems and combat mechanics in Unity.

### Implementation Details
- **Dialog System**: Branching narrative with state-dependent responses.
- **Boss Fight**: Systems-driven combat encounter.
- **Environment Design**: Storytelling through spatial layout.

title: CarrotSon
description: A 3D action/shooter game made for Winter Jam 2025. Fight against the enemies of your family.
overview:
## CarrotSon

A 3D action/shooter game created for Winter Jam 2025 as a team project.

### Details
- **Genre**: Action / Shooter
- **Team**: Collaborative jam entry with loravu and eliffbaysaall-ctrl
- **Theme**: Family, combat, and survival

title: A Dance of Destruction
description: A 48-hour GMTK Game Jam 2024 entry. Eat planets and meteorites in space — but don't eat Earth.
overview:
## A Dance of Destruction

Created in 48 hours for GMTK Game Jam 2024. A 3D space action game where you eat planets and meteorites to grow — but protect Earth at all costs.

### Gameplay
- **Core Loop**: Eat objects to grow, but don't exceed the size limit.
- **White Holes**: Use them to shrink back down.
- **Tasks**: Complete objectives while managing your size.

### Team
Collaborative jam entry with RogueLime, dibrojga, Bilaxten, RoderOne, and HonorAlp.

title: OverClocked!
description: A simulation game where you play as a robot worker converting raw materials into products before your battery runs out.
overview:
## OverClocked!

A jam entry for Winter is JAMing. You're a robot in a factory, converting raw materials into products as demanded by the CEO.

### Gameplay
- **Core Loop**: Process materials on the conveyor belt and deliver products.
- **Battery System**: Completing orders recharges you; pulling levers drains charge.
- **Organic Converter**: Handle strange materials carefully.

### Team
Collaborative entry with 3kmek, dibrojga, RoderOne, and loravu.

title: overgrown
description: A Lovecraftian-themed management and simulation game. Grow plants in your greenhouse, sell them — before they grow out of control.
overview:
## overgrown

A Lovecraftian-themed management and simulation prototype. Sell the plants you grow to unlock new plant types and developments.

### Core Mechanics
- **Seed Planting**: Plant seeds from an endless store into empty pots.
- **Irrigation**: Water plants with blood from a barrel.
- **Harvesting**: Harvest on time or plants enter the 'overgrown' stage.
- **Overgrown**: Each plant has a unique overgrown trait that activates if not harvested in time.
- **Selling**: Deliver plants, earn money, pay rent, and buy upgrades.

### Team
Collaborative project with Osman Gelmez, RogueLime, and dibrojga.

title: CardTower GDD
description: Comprehensive Game Design Document for a mobile card tower defense game, created during internship at UDO Games.
overview:
## Overview

CardTower is a GDD for a mobile-first card tower defense hybrid. Players draw cards each turn to place towers, cast spells, and adapt to procedurally generated enemy waves.

## Key Systems

- Card draw and hand management
- Tower placement and synergy system
- Economy and upgrade loop
- Procedural difficulty scaling

## Design Philosophy

The goal was to create a game that rewards planning without punishing beginners. Each design decision was tested against three player archetypes: casual, mid-core, and competitive.
